goal: Attempt one materially different, publication-relevant sf08 hardening move without repeating already exhausted public-route retries: either recover exact Nate caption metadata with a genuinely different OCR stack, or confirm that no such stack is currently available on-host and preserve the blocker as a compute/toolchain constraint rather than a discovery failure.
why_now: sf08 remains the top Route-B blocker in the hostile-reviewer publication stack. The iTutorGroup branch is currently blocked by already logged public-route friction, while the Nate branch is blocked by normalization quality plus absent OCR tooling on this host. A bounded compute escalation is the smallest non-repeat move that can still change paper-facing court-depth rhetoric.

priority_tasks.target: Nate DOJ-linked indictment PDF exact caption / exact case-number recovery
priority_tasks.current_state: Public DOJ-linked charging-document PDF is locally captured and hashed, but current bounded local OCR only stabilizes the visible '25 Cr.' fragment and no exact numeric suffix.
expected_outputs: Confidence note distinguishing exact recovery, partial recovery, and non-recoverable state
Patch-ready field targets for authoritative ledgers and court-family matrices if confidence is adequate
If recovery fails, a reproducible toolchain-limitation note sharper than the current generic OCR blocker

safe_resource_limits.network: only package/model setup if a different OCR stack must be installed; no new evidence crawling

priority_tasks.success_condition: Recover at least one exact caption-level field with explicit confidence, or reproduce failure under a materially different OCR stack/toolchain so the blocker can be restated as a toolchain ceiling rather than a low-effort local preprocessing gap.
priority_tasks.non_repeat_guardrail: Do not rerun more same-image low-diversity variants from the existing RapidOCR-style sweep; progress counts only if the OCR stack or public exact-caption source is materially different.

priority_tasks.current_state: Agency-summary pages expose EDNY Civil Action No. 1:22-cv-02565 and settlement/decree narrative, but no complaint, decree, docket entry, or judicial order text is locally captured. Existing public-route probes already logged EEOC newsroom-only depth, CourtListener auth/web blocks, Justia block, EDNY iQuery PACER login gate, challenged generic search, and a JudyRecords no-result fallback.
expected_outputs: One genuinely different public court-facing or clearly labeled open-mirror document URL if reachable without login
Exact document type captured if successful (complaint, decree, docket entry, or judicial order)
If still blocked, a stricter note preserving which route classes are already exhausted and which route class would still count as new

safe_resource_limits.network: small bounded probes only; no bulk crawling

priority_tasks.success_condition: Capture one court-originating public text surface not already logged in the frontier register, or narrow the remaining viable route class without repeating the same blocked public-entry routes.
priority_tasks.non_repeat_guardrail: Do not repeat EEOC newsroom-page parsing, anonymous CourtListener API/web retries, Justia search, EDNY iQuery login redirects, generic challenged discovery search, or the JudyRecords home-fallback route under the same host posture.

paper_thesis_use: If SF08-EXP-001 lands, Table 1A / Figure 8 / claims-layer prose can replace one partial-caption caution with exact court-facing metadata while preserving charging-stage posture.
If SF08-EXP-002 lands, the weakest authoritative row moves from agency-summary-only toward mixed agency-plus-court support, reducing the main hostile-reviewer objection behind LIMEN-C-010.
If neither lands, the request still sharpens the methods story by separating source-absence, access-friction, and OCR-toolchain ceilings inside the court-family blocker package.
boundary_notes: Public/open information and local Tyche artifacts only.
No PACER login, fees, credentials, sealed records, portal submissions, or uploads.
Do not convert charging-stage or agency-summary materials into adjudicated facts.
If confidence stays partial, preserve the blocker rather than guessing unread caption digits or court-text content.
